# Gluco Solutions

> Wellness wearable + AI coach + registered dietitian for adults with prediabetes. Non-invasive optical glucose-trend awareness. Pre-launch beta, iOS first, Canada-based.

Site: https://glucosolutions.ca
Contact: hello@glucosolutions.ca

---

## Hero

**Catch prediabetes before it catches you.**

Whether you were just diagnosed or want to stay ahead of it, we pair a wellness wearable and AI coaching with a registered dietitian. Built for adults with prediabetes.

Primary call to action: Join the waitlist.
Secondary: See the science.

---

## The problem

**The biggest health crisis nobody is watching.**

Prediabetes hides inside ordinary days. A smoothie at breakfast, a sandwich at lunch, dessert with friends. The body keeps score long before anyone notices.

### Stats

- **1 in 3** US adults has prediabetes. (Source: CDC, National Diabetes Statistics Report, 2024.)
- **80%** of people with prediabetes don't know they have it. (Source: CDC Prediabetes Surveillance.)
- **70%** progress to type 2 diabetes within a decade. (Source: American Diabetes Association.)

> Prediabetes is silent. Until it isn't.

By the time symptoms surface, type 2 has often already begun. The window to course-correct is the one most people miss.

---

## How it works

**See your day, before it happens.**

The wearable reads how your body is responding in real time. You learn what spikes you, what calms you.

### The wearable — reads through your skin

A safe, low-power light shines into your skin and reads how glucose is moving in your body. No needles. No patches. No consumables.

- Non-invasive
- Charge once a week
- Wear daily

### The AI coach — learns your body

Instead of one-size-fits-all rules, the app learns how food, sleep, and stress affect *you*. It nudges you in plain language: eat this, walk now, sleep earlier.

- Personalized
- In plain English
- No charts to read

---

## The solution — trends, not pricks

Glycemic awareness designed to fit a real life. At your desk, at the dinner table, on the trail.

### Day one — see what shapes your metabolic health

Start with a quick intake — medications, family history, sleep, activity. Every recommendation begins from your real baseline, not an average.

### Meals — snap a meal. See the score.

A photo is enough. Get an instant metabolic score, macro breakdown, and a one-line note on how this plate tends to move your glucose.

### Coach — activity, sleep, and the next small move

Your wearable folds steps, sleep, and weight into one metabolic score, then surfaces one plain-English nudge — like a ten-minute post-meal walk.

---

## How we're different — not a CGM, not a smartwatch

| Capability                  | Gluco Solutions | CGM (Dexcom, Libre) | Smartwatches |
| --------------------------- | --------------- | ------------------- | ------------ |
| No needles                  | Yes             | No                  | Yes          |
| Tracks your blood sugar     | Yes             | Yes                 | No           |
| AI coach included           | Yes             | No                  | No           |
| No prescription needed      | Yes             | No                  | Yes          |
| No throwaway sensors        | Yes             | No                  | Yes          |

---

## Early access

**The next 10 years of your metabolic health start now.**

Small choices compound into decades. Join the waitlist for early access at https://glucosolutions.ca/#waitlist. We'll only email about early access. No spam, ever.

---

## FAQ

### Is this a medical device?

No. Gluco Solutions is a wellness product. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease, and it is not a substitute for medical-grade glucose monitoring.

### Do I need a prescription?

No. The wearable and app are available without a prescription as wellness tools for glycemic trend awareness.

### How accurate is it?

Roughly 80% trend classification accuracy in benchtop testing. We classify glycemic trends — rising, stable, falling — rather than reporting absolute mg/dL values.

### iOS or Android?

iOS first. Android is on the roadmap and will follow once the iOS beta cohort matures.

### When can I get one?

Early access is rolling out to a limited beta cohort now. Broader rollout dates will be announced as we expand. Join the waitlist for invites.

### Is my data private?

Yes. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit, and we never sell it. You own your data and can delete it at any time.

---

## Disclaimers

Gluco Solutions is a wellness product. Not a medical device, not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease, and not a substitute for medical-grade glucose monitoring or professional medical advice.
